**preprocess.py**: directly generated by gemini via sample code as prompt.<br>
**modeling.ipynb**: modeling for data from preprocess.py, auc-roc score = 0.95.<br>
**Feature generator.ipynb**: add extra features for data from from preprocess.py, diff and ratio for lag in [-168,-24,-2,-1,1,2,24,168].<br>
**modeling_engineered.ipynb**: modeling for data from preprocess.py, auc-roc score = 0.95.
